article_meta.title: Shopping These Giant Yankee Candles are 40% off before Valentine's Day By Miska Salemann Published Feb

reasoning: Some genuine promotional bias in the author’s prose was correctly identified, but there is an attribution violation (quoted review text included), several clear biased phrases were missed, one questionable flag (disclosure as bias), and multiple non-standard/incorrect bias labels were used.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: Included a customer review quote within the flagged text, violating the no-quoted-text rule.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Flagging the affiliate disclosure as bias is questionable; other flagged items are genuinely promotional author prose.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed multiple clear instances of promotional/emotional spin (e.g., “euphoria,” “I’m unwell…,” narrative scenario sell, unsubstantiated performance/spec claims).
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Used non-listed/invented labels (e.g., Commercial/Promotional Bias, Selection Bias, Promotional Language) instead of valid types like Word Choice, Subjective Qualifying Adjectives, Sensationalism/Emotionalism, Unsubstantiated Claims.
